configGuideUrl.description: The URL to the API service integration configuration guide

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the API Service Integration instance was created

createdBy.description: The user ID of the API Service Integration instance creator

grantedScopes.description: The list of Okta management scopes granted to the API Service Integration instance. See [Okta management OAuth 2.0 scopes](/oauth2/#okta-admin-management).

id.description: The ID of the API Service Integration instance

name.description: The name of the API service integration that corresponds with the `type` property. This is the full name of the API service integration listed in the Okta Integration Network (OIN) catalog.

type.description: The type of the API service integration. This string is an underscore-concatenated, lowercased API service integration name. For example, `my_api_log_integration`.

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available for the current status of an application using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
